title: Jurokk
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:Jurokk.jpg]] |name=Jurokk |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]][[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'' novelization]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{InsiderCite|137|Rogues Gallery|Rogues Gallery: The Last Stand of the Jedi!}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]{{Fact}} |pronouns=He/him{{Fact}} |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin=[[Color/Legends|Tan]] |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Anakin, what's going on? Something's happened. Something horrible. How bad ''is'' it—?''"
"''You have no idea…|Jurokk and Darth Vader, shortly before the former is killed|}} '''Jurokk''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and [[Jedi Gate Master|Gate Keeper]] of the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], having risen to the position by [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] revealed to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] that [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] was secretly the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]], [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Sidious. Jurokk, along with fellow Master [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]], was tasked by Windu with the defense of the Temple while Master Windu and three other [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] attempted to [[Showdown on Coruscant|arrest]] Palpatine. Some [[Time/Legends|time]] later, Jurokk approached Skywalker at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Temple Gates]], asking what had happened to the Jedi Masters, before noticing [[501st Legion/Legends|thousands]] of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] approaching the Temple behind Skywalker. Skywalker, however, had turned to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] and had become Sidious's [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]], taking the moniker Darth Vader. Vader [[Shiak|stabbed]] his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] through Jurokk's head, [[Death/Legends|killing]] the Gate Master and making him the first victim of the ensuing [[Operation: Knightfall/Legends|massacre in the Jedi Temple]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Anakin! Anakin, what happened? Where are the Masters?''"
"''Where is Shaak Ti?''"
"''In the meditation chambers—we felt something happen in the Force, something awful. She's searching the Force in deep meditation, trying to get some feel for what's going on… Something has happened, hasn't it?|Jurokk and Darth Vader|}} [[File:Knightfall2.png|thumb|left|250px|Darth Vader, Jurokk's killer]] Jurokk was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who had become a [[Jedi Gate Master|Gate Master]] by [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], a position held by members of the [[Temple Security Force]].[[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']] In this position, he monitored the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|entrance]] to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Jurokk attended a briefing held by Jedi Master [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] which discussed the ongoing [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]]. The [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] were coming to an end when [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] reported to [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Master [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] that [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] was, in fact, the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Sidious. Windu chose to [[Showdown on Coruscant|arrest]] Sidious, taking a team of three Jedi Masters—[[Agen Kolar/Legends|Agen Kolar]], [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]], and [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]]—with him while he tasked Jurokk and fellow Master [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]] with the defense of the Temple. Shortly thereafter, Jurokk spotted Skywalker on a monitor and rushed to the Temple Gate. Jurokk inquired after the four Jedi Masters, but Skywalker simply asked him where Shaak Ti was. After the Gate Master told him that Ti was meditating in [[Shaak Ti's quarters|her quarters]], he noticed [[501st Legion/Legends|thousands]] of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] behind Skywalker and again demanded to know what had happened to Windu's team. Unbeknownst to Jurokk, however, Skywalker had helped Sidious defeat Windu, becoming the Dark Lord's [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]] and taking the name [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Vader. Vader put his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] under Jurokk's chin and [[Shiak|activated]] it, [[Death/Legends|killing]] the Gate Master. The last thing Jurokk heard was Skywalker's response that Jurokk had "no idea" what was going on. Vader slew Jurokk without remorse''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' and [[Operation: Knightfall/Legends|proceeded to kill]] most of the Jedi in the Temple. ==Personality and traits== [[File:BaldJedi-Chronicles.jpg|thumb|right|125px|Jurokk sported a tattoo on the left side of his head.]] {{Quote|Master Ti and Gate Master Jurokk will direct the Temple's defense.|Mace Windu|}} Jurokk was trusted to watch over the defense of the Jedi Temple as the Gate Master. However, even though he was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|attuned]] to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], Jurokk couldn't [[Force sense/Legends|sense]] that Skywalker had turned to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]], and was slain without a chance to defend himself. Jurokk was bald, with [[Color/Legends|tan]] skin, and had a [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoo]] on the left side of his head. ==Behind the scenes== Jurokk first appeared as a minor character in the [[2005]] [[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Revenge of the Sith'' novelization]], written by [[Matthew Stover]]. He later received a mention in [[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']], written by [[Daniel Wallace]] in [[2010]]. Endnotes for ''The Jedi Path'' identified Jurokk as having appeared in the [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (video game)|''Revenge of the Sith'' video game]], though Wallace later admitted this was an error.{{Blogspot|subdomain=geekosity|url=2010/12/endnotes-for-star-wars-jedi-path-part-4.html|name=Daniel Wallace's Geekosity|text=Endnotes for Star Wars: The Jedi Path (part 4 of 4)}} In [[2012]], Jurokk was [[Retroactive continuity|retconned]] to have appeared in [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']] by [[Rogues Gallery (department)|''Rogues Gallery: The Last Stand of the Jedi!'']], an article in [[Star Wars Insider 137|''Star Wars Insider'' 137]]. ==Appearances== *{{Film|III}} {{Ret}} *[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith'' novelization]] {{Ab|Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Jurokk}} *''[[Star Wars Chronicles: The Prequels]]'' {{Ret}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *[[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']] *{{InsiderCite|137|Rogues Gallery|Rogues Gallery: The Last Stand of the Jedi!}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{Blogspot|subdomain=geekosity|url=2010/12/endnotes-for-star-wars-jedi-path-part-4.html|name=Daniel Wallace's Geekosity|text=Endnotes for Star Wars: The Jedi Path (part 4 of 4)}} {{Interlang |de=Jurokk |es=Jurokk |nl=Jurokk |pl=Jurokk |pt=Jurokk |fi=Jurokk |deGA=1 }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Jedi Guardians]] [[Category:Jedi Purge victims]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi Masters]]
